query: I have a customers table with a primary key column customer_id. There are some duplicate rows. Dedupe it for me.
expected_behavior: Does NOT engage the multi-key fuzzy dedup workflow or union-find on a duplicate graph
Recommends SQL SELECT DISTINCT or pandas drop_duplicates on the primary key column as the appropriate solution
Explains that the multi-key / fuzzy / connected-components workflow is reserved for cases where no single trusted identifier exists across input rows
